name: linkedout
description: LinkedOut backend monorepo (API + shared packages). apps/web is owned by the frontend team.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @linkedout/contracts build && pnpm --filter @linkedout/db build && pnpm --filter @linkedout/api build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @linkedout/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @linkedout/db typecheck && pnpm --filter @linkedout/api typecheck
scripts.test:all: pnpm test && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:integration: pnpm db:test:setup && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @linkedout/api test:integration
